text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
First, let's go meet the trainee who we 
will be working with!

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
The trainee you are in charge of is called 
a trainable trainee.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Please note you can't train a trainee until 
you have obtained her training version.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
In this gacha, you'll meet the trainee you 
will be training!

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's draw from 
the Pretty Derby gacha!
